zh.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln於大約1412年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。她於大約1438年與Henry Spencer在英國瓦維其可爾霍德爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年3月4日在她的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln于大约1412年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。她于大约1438年与Henry Spencer在英国瓦維其可爾霍德爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年3月4日在她的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lincoln
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linkins
meanings: English: variant of Linkin, which itself is a form of Lincoln , prevalent in Kent.

variants.name: Lindsay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln was born about 1412, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England. She married Henry Spencer about 1438, in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 4 March 1467, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln est née environ 1412, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Henry Spencer environ 1438, à Hodnell, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln wurde um 1412 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1438 in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England Henry Spencer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1467 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln è nata il circa 1412 nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England. Lei sposato Henry Spencer circa 1438, nel Hodnell, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1467, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincolnは約1412年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーで生まれた。約1438年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアホードネルでHenry Spencerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年3月4日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln(은)는 대략 1412년 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1438년 영국 워윅실르 호드넬에서 Henry Spencer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 3월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Upper Radbourn, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: Warwick, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Henry Spencer aproximadamente 1438, em Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1467, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln родилась около 1412 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Spencer около 1438 г. в местности ходнелл, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 марта 1467 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabelle Lincoln nació aproximadamente 1412, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Henry Spencer aproximadamente 1438, en Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1467, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
